pokemon:snom.name: Snom
pokemon:snom.summary: It eats snow that piles up on the ground. The more snow it eats, the bigger and more impressive the spikes on its back grow.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It eats snow that piles up on the ground. The more snow it eats, the bigger and more impressive the spikes on its back grow.
It spits out thread imbued with a frigid sort of energy and uses it to tie its body to branches, disguising itself as an icicle while it sleeps.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It eats snow that piles up on the ground. The more snow it eats, the bigger and more impressive the spikes on its back grow.

pokemon:frosmoth.name: Frosmoth
pokemon:frosmoth.summary: It shows no mercy to any who desecrate fields and mountains. It will fly around on its icy wings, causing a blizzard to chase offenders away.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It shows no mercy to any who desecrate fields and mountains. It will fly around on its icy wings, causing a blizzard to chase offenders away.
Icy scales fall from its wings like snow as it flies over fields and mountains. The temperature of its wings is less than −290 degrees Fahrenheit.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It shows no mercy to any who desecrate fields and mountains. It will fly around on its icy wings, causing a blizzard to chase offenders away.
